title: This Radio Signal Makes Time Run Backwards
description: Seven states detected a frequency that shouldn't exist, broadcasting Beethoven recorded thirty years in the future. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 47: The Radio Signal That Shouldn't Exist...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Technicians across seven states detected the same impossible frequency. The music was from the future, and listening to it trapped minds in reverse time. Subscribe for more classified cases.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
This frequency doesn't exist anywhere.

Radio technicians detected it playing Beethoven recorded 30 years in the future. Listeners' clocks ran backwards. Three people never returned to present time.

#horror #scary #paranormal #mystery #creepy #fyp #radio #timetravel #beethoven #storytime #truestory #unexplained

instagram_metadata.reels_caption: What happens when you hear music playing backwards from a frequency that doesn't exist? Radio technicians found out when Beethoven's Ninth Symphony broadcasted from thirty years in the future. Three listeners never returned to their timeline. #horror #paranormal #mystery #radio #timetravel #creepy #beethoven

facebook_metadata.reels_caption: A radio frequency that doesn't exist started broadcasting Beethoven recorded thirty years in the future. Three technicians who listened completely never returned to present time.

x_twitter_metadata.main_tweet: The station broadcasts every seventeen months from coordinates that don't exist. We stop listening when the music plays forward. #horror #mystery #radio
